title: Fancy Mobs
description: Comprehensive Minecraft expansion that brings a host of vibrant new creatures, gear, and magical artifacts to your world—transforming every biome into an unexpected adventure.
body:
FANCY MOBS 🐧

🌊 New Aquatic & Arctic Fauna
Penguins: Waddle across icebergs in cold biomes, can be tamed with raw fish. 🐟

Angler Fish: Lurk in the ocean’s darkest depths—emit an eerie bioluminescent glow, and drop angler meat when defeated, a rare cooking ingredient.

🐌 Earthy Critters

Earthworms, Snails

Snails when killed Leave behind snail shells, which can be combined into a Snail Wand—a tool that temporarily slows nearby mobs.

🤖 New Golems
Mushroom Golem & Ender Golem

🧚 Enchanted Denizens
Fairies: Tiny winged allies that flit through forests, occasionally granting you magic dust—the key ingredient for the new Potion of Flight.

🛡️ Crab-Shell Armor & Exotic Loot
Crab-Shell Armor: A full set of armor forged from the toughest crab carapaces.

Snail Shells & Angler Meat: New crafting materials that unlock potion recipes, and gourmet foods

Magic Dust: Collected from defeated fairies or refined from shells, this sparkling powder lets you brew the Potion of Flight, granting temporary aerial freedom.



☕ Support Me:

If you enjoy this mod and want to support its development, consider buying me a coffee on Ko-fi! 
https://ko-fi.com/kofcior](https://ko-fi.com/kofcior
Thank you for playing and hope you enjoyed! 🪄✨
